= GitHub Actions workflows
:toc: left

Literate source for all GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow files.
Tangle pass: `dir = ".github/workflows/"`, `gen = ".github/workflows/"`, `<<` `>>` delimiters.

== CI workflow

Builds all container targets in parallel, builds on native Windows, and runs
tests + clippy on each push or pull request.

[source,yaml]
----
// <<@file ci.yml>>=
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build-containers:
    name: Build (${{ matrix.target }})
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        target: [ glibc, musl, windows, fedora ]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Install Podman
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y podman

      - name: Build container
        run: podman build --target ${{ matrix.target }} -t weaveback-${{ matrix.target }} .

      - name: Export artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/${{ matrix.target }}
          podman create --name weaveback-export weaveback-${{ matrix.target }}
          podman cp weaveback-export:/out/. dist/${{ matrix.target }}/
          podman rm weaveback-export

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: weaveback-${{ matrix.target }}
          path: dist/${{ matrix.target }}

  build-windows-native:
    name: Build (windows-native)
    runs-on: windows-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - name: Build
        run: cargo build --release --workspace

      - name: Collect artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir dist\windows-native
          copy target\release\weaveback-macro.exe dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\weaveback-tangle.exe  dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\weaveback-docgen.exe dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\wb-tangle.exe dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\wb-query.exe dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\wb-serve.exe dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\wb-mcp.exe dist\windows-native\

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: weaveback-windows-native
          path: dist/windows-native

  python-wheels:
    name: Python wheels (${{ matrix.wheel }})
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        wheel: [ cp314-manylinux_x86_64, cp314-musllinux_x86_64 ]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'

      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6

      - name: Clean local wheel residue
        run: |
          rm -rf python/weaveback-agent/.venv
          rm -f python/weaveback-agent/src/weaveback_agent/_weaveback*.so

      - name: Build wheel
        run: |
          CIBW_BUILD='${{ matrix.wheel }}' uv run --with cibuildwheel python -m cibuildwheel python/weaveback-agent --platform linux

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: weaveback-python-${{ matrix.wheel }}
          path: python/weaveback-agent/wheelhouse/*

  python-wheels-windows:
    name: Python wheels (cp314-win_amd64)
    runs-on: windows-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'

      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6

      - name: Clean local wheel residue
        run: |
          Remove-Item -Recurse -Force python/weaveback-agent/.venv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Remove-Item -Force python/weaveback-agent/src/weaveback_agent/_weaveback*.so -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

      - name: Build wheel
        run: |
          $env:CIBW_BUILD='cp314-win_amd64'
          uv run --with cibuildwheel python -m cibuildwheel python/weaveback-agent --platform windows

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        with:
          name: weaveback-python-cp314-win_amd64
          path: python/weaveback-agent/wheelhouse/*

  test:
    name: Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
      - run: cargo test --workspace
      - run: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings
// @
----

== Pages workflow

Builds and deploys the weaveback documentation site to GitHub Pages on every
push to `main`.  Uses `weaveback-docgen` to render all `.adoc` files to HTML
with PlantUML diagram support.

[source,yaml]
----
// <<@file pages.yml>>=
name: Docs → GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: true

jobs:
  deploy:
    name: Build & deploy docs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.page_url }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      # Rust build cache — cuts rebuild time on subsequent runs
      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
        with:
          key: docgen

      - name: Install Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install serve-ui dependencies
        run: npm install --prefix scripts/serve-ui

      - name: Build serve-ui assets
        run: node scripts/serve-ui/build.mjs

      - name: Install diagram toolchain
        run: |
          sudo apt-get install -y default-jre-headless graphviz
          curl -fsSL https://d2lang.com/install.sh | sh -s -- --prefix /usr/local
          d2 --version
          mkdir -p /opt/plantuml
          curl -L https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/releases/latest/download/plantuml.jar \
               -o /opt/plantuml/plantuml.jar
          java -jar /opt/plantuml/plantuml.jar -version

      - name: Build weaveback-docgen
        run: cargo build --release --package weaveback-docgen

      - name: Generate docs
        run: |
          cargo run --release --package weaveback-docgen -- \
            --special %% --special ^ \
            --plantuml-jar /opt/plantuml/plantuml.jar

      - name: Copy static assets
        run: |
          mkdir -p docs/html/docs
          cp docs/ai-panel.png docs/html/docs/ai-panel.png

      - name: Create root index
        run: cp docs/html/README.html docs/html/index.html

      - uses: actions/configure-pages@v5

      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: docs/html

      - id: deploy
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
// @
----

== Release workflow

Triggered by version tags (`v*`).  Creates a GitHub release and uploads
cross-compiled artifacts from the container build matrix plus native Windows.

[source,yaml]
----
// <<@file release.yml>>=
name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  create-release:
    name: Create release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - name: Create GitHub release
        run: gh release create "${{ github.ref_name }}" --title "${{ github.ref_name }}" --generate-notes
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  release-containers:
    name: Release (${{ matrix.target }})
    needs: create-release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        target: [ glibc, musl, windows, fedora ]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - name: Install Podman
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y podman

      - name: Build container
        run: podman build --target ${{ matrix.target }} -t weaveback-${{ matrix.target }} .

      - name: Export artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/${{ matrix.target }}
          podman create --name weaveback-export weaveback-${{ matrix.target }}
          podman cp weaveback-export:/out/. dist/${{ matrix.target }}/
          podman rm weaveback-export

      - name: Upload release assets
        run: gh release upload "${{ github.ref_name }}" dist/${{ matrix.target }}/* --clobber
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  release-windows-native:
    name: Release (windows-native)
    needs: create-release
    runs-on: windows-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - name: Build
        run: cargo build --release --workspace

      - name: Collect artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir dist\windows-native
          copy target\release\weaveback-macro.exe  dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\weaveback-tangle.exe dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\weaveback-docgen.exe dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\wb-tangle.exe        dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\wb-query.exe         dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\wb-serve.exe         dist\windows-native\
          copy target\release\wb-mcp.exe           dist\windows-native\

      - name: Upload release assets
        run: gh release upload "${{ github.ref_name }}" dist/windows-native/* --clobber
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  release-python-wheels:
    name: Release Python wheels (${{ matrix.wheel }})
    needs: create-release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        wheel: [ cp314-manylinux_x86_64, cp314-musllinux_x86_64 ]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'

      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6

      - name: Clean local wheel residue
        run: |
          rm -rf python/weaveback-agent/.venv
          rm -f python/weaveback-agent/src/weaveback_agent/_weaveback*.so

      - name: Build wheel
        run: |
          CIBW_BUILD='${{ matrix.wheel }}' uv run --with cibuildwheel python -m cibuildwheel python/weaveback-agent --platform linux

      - name: Upload release assets
        run: gh release upload "${{ github.ref_name }}" python/weaveback-agent/wheelhouse/* --clobber
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  release-python-wheels-windows:
    name: Release Python wheels (cp314-win_amd64)
    needs: create-release
    runs-on: windows-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.14'

      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6

      - name: Clean local wheel residue
        run: |
          Remove-Item -Recurse -Force python/weaveback-agent/.venv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
          Remove-Item -Force python/weaveback-agent/src/weaveback_agent/_weaveback*.so -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

      - name: Build wheel
        run: |
          $env:CIBW_BUILD='cp314-win_amd64'
          uv run --with cibuildwheel python -m cibuildwheel python/weaveback-agent --platform windows

      - name: Upload release assets
        run: gh release upload "${{ github.ref_name }}" python/weaveback-agent/wheelhouse/* --clobber
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
// @
----
